props.allowedMonths: Restricts which months can be selected. Accepts an array of month numbers (0-11) or a function that receives a month number and returns a boolean.
props.modelValue: The selected month in `YYYY-MM` format, or null if no month is selected. When `multiple` is set, expects an array of strings.
props.monthsColumns: Number of columns to use when displaying months in grid view. When set to `1`, switches to list view.
props.multiple: Allows multiple month selections. When set to `true`, enables multi-select. When set to `'range'`, enables range selection where the first and last selected months define the range boundaries.
props.selectedIcon: Icon to display next to selected months in list view.
props.reverseTransition: The transition used when changing year into the past
props.title: Specify a title text for the component.
props.transition: The transition used when changing year into the future
props.yearsColumns: Number of columns to use when displaying years in year selection view.

slots.header: Slot for customizing the header area of the picker.
slots.title: Slot for customizing the title area of the picker.
slots.actions: Slot for adding action buttons at the bottom of the picker.
slots.month: Slot for customizing the rendering of individual month items.
